title: Sample Adventure Hunt ⚠️ FAKE COORDINATES
description: This is a sample hunt with fake coordinates for demonstration. Use the Hunt Builder to create your own real treasure hunts with real locations. Do NOT commit real hunt files to a public repository.
finalReward: 🏆 You found all the sample treasures! Now go build your own real hunt with your own locations.

treasures.title: Sample #1: The Starting Point ⚠️
treasures.clue: This fake treasure is at coordinates 0,0 — the middle of the Atlantic Ocean. Replace it with your own location in the Hunt Builder.
treasures.hint: Hint: This is a SAMPLE — build your own hunt with real locations!
treasures.foundMessage: You found the fake sample treasure! 🎉
treasures.rewardText: Sample Achievement: Now create your own real hunt!
treasures.privateNotes: FAKE SAMPLE — coordinates 0,0. This treasure exists only for demonstration. Delete it and create your own.

treasures.title: Sample #2: Null Island Explorer ⚠️
treasures.clue: Near the famous Null Island. Another fake location — build your own treasure with real GPS coordinates!
treasures.hint: Sample hint: all treasures in this demo are fake.
treasures.rewardText: Demo Badge: Time to make your own adventure!
treasures.privateNotes: FAKE SAMPLE — coordinates ~0,0. Replace with real locations.

treasures.title: Sample #3: The Final Sample ⚠️
treasures.clue: The last fake treasure. All coordinates in this sample file are in the middle of the ocean. Go build your own adventure!
treasures.hint: Final hint: Treasure Trail stores your real hunts locally on your device — never on the public web.
treasures.rewardText: Sample Complete: Head to the Hunt Builder and create your own real treasure hunt!
treasures.privateNotes: FAKE SAMPLE — coordinates ~0,0. Your real hunts will be stored only in your browser.
